name: PHASE-47 W-2 meta-regression: security_auditor wired to v7 (no-sink clause + Example D)
description: Stage W-2 meta-regression. Mirrors the S208/S340/S341 pattern — file/loader inspection only, no LLM calls, no real OS APIs. Proves the security_auditor role -> _prompt_loader -> security_auditor_v7 wiring that PHASE-47 W-2 introduces: (a) the role's declared system_prompt_id === 'security_auditor_v7'; (b) the role source resolves its prompt via loadPrompt('security_auditor_v7'); (c) security_auditor_v7 carries the new no-sink anchors that target the PHASE-46 false-positive SQL-injection BLOCKER on an in-memory build (worked Example D: in-memory array filter, no query sink -> threat_level NONE; an injection finding requires a present sink; speculative future-DB risk is out of scope); (d) RECALL + precision controls are retained — Example A parameterized-query code (=> WARN) and Example B concatenated-SQL code (=> BLOCKER) are both still present (guard against deletion); (e) the protected first-500-char prefix is byte-identical to security_auditor_v6 (preserves the S96-S99 mock prefix keys). HONEST SCOPE: this proves the intervention is installed + recall retained + prefix protected; it does NOT prove the real model's verdict is corrected (mock returns a fixed verdict) — that is the owner-gated real replay per the decision §4 item 6. W-2 is prompt + role-pointer only; §ARC frozen at 10.
